---
id: get-system-configuration
title: "System configuration (alpha)"
sidebar_label: "System configuration (alpha)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/apis-tools/orchestration-cluster-api-rest/specifications/orchestration-cluster-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MarkerAddedInVersion from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerAddedInVersion";

import MarkerStronglyConsistentExtension from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerStronglyConsistentExtension";

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"}>
  {"System configuration (alpha)"} <MarkerAddedInVersion version="8.9" />
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/system/configuration"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

<MarkerStronglyConsistentExtension />

Returns the current system configuration. The response is an envelope
that groups settings by feature area.

:::note
This endpoint is an [alpha feature](/components/early-access/alpha/alpha-features.md) and may be subject to change
in future releases.
:::

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema title={"Body"} body={undefined}></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "Current system configuration grouped by feature area.",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "Envelope for all system configuration sections. Each property\nrepresents a feature area.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: [
              "jobMetrics",
              "components",
              "deployment",
              "authentication",
              "cloud",
            ],
            properties: {
              jobMetrics: {
                description:
                  "Configuration for job metrics collection and export.",
                type: "object",
                required: [
                  "enabled",
                  "exportInterval",
                  "maxWorkerNameLength",
                  "maxJobTypeLength",
                  "maxTenantIdLength",
                  "maxUniqueKeys",
                ],
                properties: {
                  enabled: {
                    description: "Whether job metrics export is enabled.",
                    type: "boolean",
                    example: true,
                  },
                  exportInterval: {
                    description:
                      "The interval at which job metrics are exported, as an ISO 8601 duration.",
                    type: "string",
                    example: "PT5M",
                  },
                  maxWorkerNameLength: {
                    description:
                      "The maximum length of the worker name used in job metrics labels.",
                    type: "integer",
                    format: "int32",
                    example: 100,
                  },
                  maxJobTypeLength: {
                    description:
                      "The maximum length of the job type used in job metrics labels.",
                    type: "integer",
                    format: "int32",
                    example: 100,
                  },
                  maxTenantIdLength: {
                    description:
                      "The maximum length of the tenant ID used in job metrics labels.",
                    type: "integer",
                    format: "int32",
                    example: 30,
                  },
                  maxUniqueKeys: {
                    description:
                      "The maximum number of unique metric keys tracked for job metrics.",
                    type: "integer",
                    format: "int32",
                    example: 9500,
                  },
                },
                title: "JobMetricsConfigurationResponse",
              },
              components: {
                description:
                  "Configuration for active Camunda components in the deployment.",
                type: "object",
                required: ["active"],
                properties: {
                  active: {
                    description:
                      "List of webapp components whose UI is enabled in this deployment.",
                    type: "array",
                    items: {
                      description: "A Camunda webapp component name.",
                      type: "string",
                      enum: ["operate", "tasklist", "admin"],
                      title: "WebappComponent",
                    },
                    example: ["operate", "tasklist"],
                  },
                },
                title: "ComponentsConfigurationResponse",
                "x-added-in-version": "8.10",
              },
              deployment: {
                description: "Configuration for deployment characteristics.",
                type: "object",
                required: ["isMultiTenancyEnabled", "maxRequestSize"],
                properties: {
                  isMultiTenancyEnabled: {
                    description: "Whether multi-tenancy is enabled.",
                    type: "boolean",
                    example: false,
                  },
                  maxRequestSize: {
                    description: "The maximum HTTP request size in bytes.",
                    type: "integer",
                    format: "int64",
                    example: 4194304,
                  },
                },
                title: "DeploymentConfigurationResponse",
                "x-added-in-version": "8.10",
              },
              authentication: {
                description:
                  "Configuration for authentication and session management.",
                type: "object",
                required: ["canLogout", "isLoginDelegated"],
                properties: {
                  canLogout: {
                    description:
                      "Whether users can log out (false for SaaS deployments).",
                    type: "boolean",
                    example: true,
                  },
                  isLoginDelegated: {
                    description:
                      "Whether login is delegated to an external identity provider.",
                    type: "boolean",
                    example: false,
                  },
                },
                title: "AuthenticationConfigurationResponse",
                "x-added-in-version": "8.10",
              },
              cloud: {
                description: "Configuration for SaaS/cloud-specific settings.",
                type: "object",
                required: ["stage"],
                properties: {
                  stage: {
                    description: "The cloud deployment stage.",
                    type: "string",
                    nullable: true,
                    allOf: [
                      {
                        description: "The cloud deployment stage.",
                        type: "string",
                        enum: ["dev", "int", "prod"],
                        title: "CloudStage",
                      },
                    ],
                    example: "prod",
                  },
                },
                title: "CloudConfigurationResponse",
                "x-added-in-version": "8.10",
              },
            },
            title: "SystemConfigurationResponse",
          },
          examples: {
            "example-1": {
              value: {
                jobMetrics: {
                  enabled: true,
                  exportInterval: "PT5M",
                  maxWorkerNameLength: 100,
                  maxJobTypeLength: 100,
                  maxTenantIdLength: 30,
                  maxUniqueKeys: 9500,
                },
                components: { active: ["operate", "tasklist"] },
                deployment: {
                  isMultiTenancyEnabled: false,
                  maxRequestSize: 4194304,
                },
                authentication: { canLogout: true, isLoginDelegated: false },
                cloud: { stage: "prod" },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "401": {
      description: "The request lacks valid authentication credentials.",
      headers: { "WWW-Authenticate": { schema: { type: "string" } } },
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "An internal error occurred while processing the request.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
